strategy: Kill everything in one AoE. Defeating Lacombe makes Berkshire Sandstorm the team every round, and defeating Berkshire makes Tamworth cast Big Bad Hound every round.
Do not Beguile the minions either; beguiling Berkshire or Lacombe triggers the Sandstorm cheat.
Stack a blade or trap and drop one AoE so the boss and both houses fall together.
Balance resists itself 50%, so hit off-school.
cheatNotes: Once Lacombe is defeated, Berkshire interrupt-casts Sandstorm on the team every round.
Beguiling Berkshire or Lacombe triggers that Sandstorm cheat too.
Once Berkshire is defeated, Tamworth interrupt-casts Big Bad Hound every round.
